title: break-reminder.data
description: Health / focus-hygiene widget. Tracks how long since last break, sitting time, eye-rest countdown. The副屏 is a passive observer — good fit for nag-free health nudges.

last_break_min_ago.description: Minutes since the user last took a break

sitting_min.description: Minutes the user has been sitting

next_eye_rest_min.description: Minutes until next 20-20-20 eye rest (negative = overdue)

advice.description: Optional one-line nudge, e.g. 'stand up' / 'look 20ft away'
